boundary_summary.severity_boundary_interpretation: I4 survives one mild weakening. I4-A maps the local boundary: positive-margin rows above the 0.06 floor support bounded weakening, the exact floor row is zero-margin partial, and rows below the floor fail closed. Full removal is rejected.

detail.blocked_condition: support surface can be changed or removed with no measurable source-current geometric effect
detail.expected_result: support removal changes coherence, packet records, and event trace
detail.rung_effect: demotes positive rows to same-basin invariance under irrelevant support perturbation if triggered
